free_text: Photonuclear reactions in medium weight nuclei V-51,
Mn-55, and Cu.
Thick targets with natural isotopic composition.
26 cm3 Ge(Li) detector having 4.7 keV
resolution at Egamma = 1 MeV.
Statistical errors given.
The systematic errors, including the
uncertainties in the determination of detector
photoefficiency, the quantameter constant and the
data on the reaction products decay.
New results on the photospallation of the medium
weigh nuclei 51V, 55Mn and Cu at bremsstrahlung
end-point energy between 2 and 5 GeV are presented.
The yields of residual nuclei were measured by the
activation method using a Ge(Li) detector. The
results are analyzed with the empirical Rudstam
formula and compared with data obtained in lower
energy photon proton induced reactions.
Approved by authors.
Corrected by V.Varlamov, V.Mclane.
Corrected by V.Varlamov.
Journal code in reference of Subent 1 changed,
isomer = 0 flags instead of blank used for partial
cross section data for the element ground states.
Corrected by SD and VV: dates,lowercase,
BIB update, DECAY-DATA, REACTION, DECAY-FLAG added
to SUBENTs 002-016.
Corrected by VV and SD: Corrections in all
SUBENTs, SUBENTs 014 - 016 deleted because calculated
data.
